text: Which of the following is considered an assessment tool?

options.text: Open deck arrangement including the height of the deck above water

explanation: In the context of a Ship Security Assessment (SSA), understanding the ship's physical layout, such as open deck arrangements and deck height, is crucial. This information helps identify potential vulnerabilities for unauthorized access (e.g., from small boats) and aids in developing effective countermeasures as part of the Ship Security Plan (SSP).
